name: TestWaitForEthernetPhyState
title: TestWaitForEthernetPhyState
syntax: long TestWaitForEthernetPhyState(ethernetport hwport, long state, dword aTimeout);
description: Waits for the occurrence of the specified Ethernet PHY state. Should the Ethernet PHY state not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless. If the Ethernet PHY has already the expected state, the function returns immediately with return value 1.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Wait for this state: 1: normal state 2: sleep state 3: power off state 4: sleep request

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms] (Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
